reviewer.displayName: Fabricación y Montajes De Estructuras Metalicas

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar, tienen una parrilla de tenedor libre terrible!!! Al menos a mi me toco comer un vacío que era un manjar, la mesa para armar ensaladas y entrada un lujo y eso que llegamos a las 14:45, 15 minutos antes del cierre. La parrilla es del ACA por lo que si sos socio tenes descuento. A la fecha del 18 de marzo del 2025 por persona salía $20.000, bebidas y postres aparte. Parador muy recomendable al menos en lo que a mi me toco. Tienen wifi, aceptan tarjetas. No hay excusa. Tienen plazita para niños.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop, they have an amazing all-you-can-eat grill! I had a flank steak that was delicious, and the salad bar and appetizer platter were fantastic, even though we arrived at 2:45 PM, just 15 minutes before closing time. The grill belongs to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), so members get a discount. As of March 18, 2025, the price per person was $20,000, drinks and desserts not included. A highly recommended stop, at least based on my experience. They have Wi-Fi and accept credit cards. No excuses to miss it! They also have a small playground.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUN3N3JXMHdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Este lugar cada vez que paso, va empeorando... Antes era famoso por la higiene de los baños y hoy son deprorable. Prácticamente no paro más y sigo hasta Giles o en la Shell de al lado. Los precios son altísimos y la atención es pésima.

(Translated by Google)
This place gets worse every time I pass by... It used to be famous for its clean restrooms, but now they're deplorable. I practically never stop here anymore and just keep going to Giles or the Shell station next door. The prices are outrageous and the service is terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRcUphZEh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación! servicios muy completos. Asistencia mecánica /remolque (Jorge) un genio. Sólo te tenés que bancar la mala onda de atención al público en el Shop. Un detalle 😉

(Translated by Google)
Very good station! Very comprehensive services. Mechanical assistance/towing (Jorge) is a genius. You just have to put up with the bad customer service at the shop. A thoughtful touch 😉
